articles.title: GTA 6 'About 18 Months Behind the Original Date,' Take-Two Boss Says - IGN
articles.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has said GTA 6 is about 18 months behind its original release date, suggesting spring 2025 was once the internal target.

articles.title: Xbox Game Pass loses another five games in May 2026 - TrueAchievements
articles.description: The next batch of games leaving Xbox Game Pass in May 2026 has now been confirmed. Another five games will drop out of the subscription service at the end of May.

articles.title: Intel’s First Wildcat Lake Laptop Hits Retail at sub-$600, Undercutting Apple’s MacBook Neo, Doubles the RAM and Battery Capacity - Wccftech

articles.title: Jack’s Deli ‘unexpectedly’ closing for 4-6 months - Cleveland Jewish News
articles.description: After 40 years, Jack’s Deli and Restaurant in University Heights abruptly closed its doors on May 17.

articles.title: New Windows 'MiniPlasma' zero-day exploit gives SYSTEM access, PoC released - BleepingComputer
articles.description: A cybersecurity researcher has released a proof-of-concept exploit for a Windows privilege escalation zero-day dubbed "MiniPlasma" that lets attackers gain SYSTEM privileges on fully patched Windows systems.

articles.title: Microsoft is retiring Teams’ Together Mode - The Verge
articles.description: Microsoft is retiring Teams’ Together Mode to focus on improving video quality and performance instead of gimmicks.

articles.description: A 1,025-hp Dodge Demon took on a 750-hp Ford Mustang in a drag race and finished nearly a second quicker, with a faster mile-per-hour as well.

articles.title: Lenovo releases new 16-inch laptop with 96 GB LPCAMM2 and AMD processors sooner than expected - Notebookcheck
articles.description: Lenovo is now selling the first AMD-based laptop featuring user-upgradeable LPCAMM2 RAM. Also available with up to a 120 Hz VRR OLED display, the ThinkPad P16s Gen 5 can be configured with a 90 Wh battery and Nvidia RTX dGPUs, too.
